QH-01.question: What is the total amount invested or committed to the U.S. business?

QH-02.question: Where did the investment funds primarily come from?

QH-03.question: Over what time period were these funds accumulated?

QH-04.question: Do you have bank statements showing the funds in your account?
options: No — funds came from a sale or transfer

QH-05.question: Were any of the funds received as a gift or loan from a third party?
options: Yes — all funds are a gift or loan

QH-06.question: Who provided the gift or loan?

QH-05: Yes — all funds are a gift or loan

QH-07.question: Is there a signed gift letter or loan agreement?

QH-05: Yes — all funds are a gift or loan

QH-08.question: How were the funds transferred to the U.S. business?
options: Wire transfer to U.S. business account
Payment to U.S. attorney trust account

QH-09.question: Do you have wire transfer records or payment receipts?

QH-10.question: Were funds converted from a foreign currency?

QH-11.question: Do you have foreign exchange records showing the conversion?
